Title: Implement compliance in a cloud-native .NET 8 application
Description: Microservice applications, because of their distributed nature, can be difficult to secure. In this module, you'll learn how to classify sensitive data in a cloud-native application, redact sensitive data in log files, and generate compliance reports for a cloud-native application.

Title: Implement a versioning strategy
Description: Learn to implement effective versioning strategies for packages using semantic versioning, package promotion workflows, and Azure Artifacts views to manage package quality and lifecycle.

Title: Scale AI in your organization
Description: Learn enterprise AI management with our free open online course, including scaling AI.

Title: Configure Internet Information Services websites and applications
Description: Learn to configure Internet Information Services (IIS) websites and applications on Windows Server.

Title: Find the best classification model with Automated Machine Learning
Description: Learn how to find the best classification model with automated machine learning (AutoML). You'll use the Python SDK (v2) to configure and run an AutoML job.

Title: Migrate your repository by using GitHub best practices
Description: Learn to move your existing project to GitHub from a legacy version control system.

Title: Implement security in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
Description: We will learn the different security models that Azure Cosmos DB uses.

Title: Deploy a model with GitHub Actions
Description: machine learning operations, MLOps, model deployment, online endpoint

Title: Implement Lakeflow Jobs with Azure Databricks
Description: Learn how to create, configure, schedule, and monitor Lakeflow Jobs in Azure Databricks to automate your data pipelines.

Title: Design governance
Description: Azure Architects design and recommend governance solutions.

Title: Assess deployment readiness
Description: Discusses some of the tools that you can use to perform detailed assessments of existing deployments, and describes some of the challenges that you may face.

Title: Get started with FinOps
Description: Learn about the FinOps Framework and the impact of transitioning from a CapEx to an OpEx model.

Title: Store and retrieve data using literal and variable values in C#
Description: Use data in your applications by creating literal values and variable values of different data types.

Title: Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure Virtual Machine
Description: Discover the tools and features available to migrate SQL workloads from on-premises to Azure Virtual Machines (VMs).

Title: Utilize threat intelligence in Microsoft Sentinel
Description: Utilize threat intelligence in Microsoft Sentinel

Title: Device management with Microsoft Intune
Description: In this module, you’ll learn how Microsoft Intune helps you easily manage devices and apps from the cloud.

Title: Migrate VMware vSphere resources from on-premises to Azure VMware Solution
Description: Learn how to migrate virtual machines from an on-premises VMware environment to Azure VMware Solution by using VMware HCX.

Title: Choose the best Azure Quantum option for your needs
Description: Learn how to get started with Azure Quantum and choose the best option for your needs.

Title: Introduction to Azure Site Recovery
Description: This module explains what Azure Site Recovery does, how it works, and when you should choose to use Azure Site Recovery as a solution to meet your organization's needs.

Title: Microsoft Education for K-12 administrators
Description: In this module, you'll learn how Microsoft Education solutions support the needs of K-12 administrators.

Title: Allow users to reset their password with Microsoft Entra self-service password reset
Description: Learn how to allow users to reset their password with Microsoft Entra self-service password reset.

Title: Configure secure access to Azure Repos from pipelines
Description: Configure secure access to Azure Repos from pipelines.

Title: Eliminate public network exposure of Azure PaaS services
Description: Eliminate public network exposure of Azure PaaS and AI services using private endpoints and Azure Private Link. Configure private endpoints, integrate private DNS, expose internal services using Private Link service, and enforce private access adoption using Azure Policy and Defender for Cloud.

Title: GitHub administration for GitHub Advanced Security
Description: Understand where GitHub Advanced Security fits in your software development lifecycle and how to enable and roll it out in your organization.

Title: Design and implement intelligent search with SQL
Description: Implement intelligent search capabilities in SQL Server and Azure SQL by combining traditional full-text search with semantic vector search. Learn to choose search approaches, prepare SQL for vector search, and implement vector, hybrid, and ranking-based search patterns.

Title: Configure for alerts and detections in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
Description: Configure for alerts and detections in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint

Title: Create and manage SQL Agent jobs
Description: Create and manage SQL Agent jobs

Title: Explore Azure for SAP compute
Description: This module explores the design of scalable, performant, and resilient compute components for SAP deployments in Azure. Prepare for Exam AZ-120 Planning and Administering Microsoft Azure for SAP Workloads.

Title: Manage security for Azure Virtual Desktop
Description: The Windows client for Azure Virtual Desktop integrates Azure Virtual Desktop on local machines. You’ll learn the critical actions for keeping your users safe.

Title: Introduction to Azure Sphere
Description: Learn how to evaluate whether Azure Sphere is the right product for creating IoT applications.

Title: Configure security controls and remediate recommendations in Defender for Cloud
Description: Configure Defender for Cloud security standards at management group scope and systematically deploy security controls to remediate recommendations at scale using Fix, governance rules, Policy remediation tasks, and exemptions.

Title: Review the features and tools for Azure Cloud Shell
Description: This module covers Azure Cloud Shell and its features.

Title: Introduction to analyzing costs and creating budgets with Microsoft Cost Management
Description: Learn how to use cost analysis to understand how your costs accrue each month.

Title: Create an image recognition solution with Azure IoT Edge, Azure AI Custom Vision, and Azure Speech
Description: Build an image recognition solution that runs on Azure IoT Edge. Use a prebuilt, exported Azure AI Custom Vision model locally at the edge and call Azure Speech in Foundry Tools to announce labels with text to speech.

Title: Implement Desired State Configuration (DSC)
Description: Learn to implement Desired State Configuration (DSC) with Azure Automation, including configuration drift management, DSC configurations, Linux automation, and hybrid management strategies.

Title: Understand concurrency in MySQL
Description: Learn about concurrency in MySQL, including how to limit the number of connections, and when to use thread pools.

Title: Introduction to AD DS
Description: Introduction to AD DS

Title: Protect sensitive data in a digital world
Description: Protect sensitive data in a digital world.

Title: Get started with spec-driven development and GitHub Spec Kit
Description: Learn to implement the spec-driven development methodology and GitHub Spec Kit for greenfield applications.

Title: Deploy the Microsoft Defender for Endpoint environment
Description: Deploy the Microsoft Defender for Endpoint environment

Title: Explore identity in Microsoft Entra ID
Description: This module covers a wide view of the definition and available services for identity provided in the Microsoft Entra ID. Start with the basics of authentication, authorization, and access tokens. After building a firm foundation of what an identity is, why it's important. Then we move into governance and lifecycle management of your identities and identity solutions. The final topic opens up the term Zero Trust to see how it should be applied to your identity solutions.

Title: Testing with Pytest
Description: Use Pytest, a popular test framework to write and run tests in Python. Learn about useful patterns, utilities, and helpful reporting that make Pytest a solid choice for testing.

Title: Troubleshoot network security issues with Microsoft Azure
Description: Troubleshoot network issues revolving around WAF, NSG, Azure Firewall, latency within a virtual network. AZ720 AZ-720 az-720 networking

Title: Branch the flow of code using the switch-case construct in C#
Description: Learn how to add branching logic that matches one variable or expression against many possible values.

Title: Develop a data API for Azure SQL Database
Description: Learn how to create modern REST data API for Azure SQL Database. We'll delve into Data API Builder, a powerful cross-platform that simplifies the creation of endpoints for your Azure SQL Database. With features like automatic query generation, granular security controls, and seamless integration with other Azure services, the Data API Builder can effortlessly transform your database into a versatile API.

Title: Oversee device profiles
Description: This module introduces students to monitoring profiles to ensure correct assignments and resolving conflicts when multiple profiles are applied.

Title: Design solutions for identity and access management
Description: Learn how to design identity and access management solutions for cloud, hybrid, and multicloud environments, including external identities, Conditional Access, and secrets management.

Title: Build your first deployment stack
Description: Learn how to build and deploy deployment stacks.

Title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Security
Description: Discover the tools that Azure provides to help you design a secure environment throughout your infrastructure, data, network, and applications.

Title: Develop accessible resize and reflow
Description: Learn why supporting resize and reflow is crucial for creating accessible websites and apps.

Title: Get started with data warehouses in Microsoft Fabric
Description: Understand the key components and design considerations for implementation of data warehouses in Microsoft Fabric.

Title: Perfect the cut - postproduction and enhancement with Microsoft Clipchamp
Description: Discover how Microsoft Clipchamp streamlines postproduction for animated projects, including AI-powered color grading, transitions, asset integration, and export optimization.

Title: Connect IoT devices to Azure AI Speech using Azure Functions
Description: Create and deploy a cloud-hosted Azure Function that uses Azure AI Speech translation with an MXChip IoT DevKit

Title: Save money with Azure Reserved Instances
Description: Learn how to save money by taking advantage of Azure Reserved Instances.

Title: Use recommended tools to create a data-flow diagram
Description: You can use any canvas, physical or virtual, to create a data-flow diagram. Engineers at Microsoft recommend three tools to help you in your threat modeling journey.

Title: Describe the data governance solutions of Microsoft Purview
Description: Describe the data governance solutions of Microsoft Purview.

Title: Perform cross-document transactional operations with the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
Description: Perform operations on multiple items in single logical units of work.

Title: Use watchlists in Microsoft Sentinel
Description: Use watchlists in Microsoft Sentinel

Title: Implement feature flags in a cloud-native ASP.NET Core microservices app
Description: This module guides you through implementing a feature flag in an ASP.NET Core microservices app using Azure App Configuration.

Title: Implement Hyper-V Replica
Description: Implement Hyper-V Replica

Title: Work with arrays and hash tables in Windows PowerShell scripts
Description: This module explains how to use arrays and hash tables in Windows PowerShell scripts.

Title: Build and query with Azure Database for PostgreSQL
Description: Learn how to use Azure Database for PostgreSQL as a data foundation for AI applications, including schema design, SQL queries, and Python integration.

Title: Use AI-powered tools for training
Description: This module contains sample activities that demonstrate how to integrate AI-powered tools into your learning environment.

Title: Extend a pipeline to use multiple templates
Description: Fundamental concepts and best practices for creating nested templates.

Title: Queue and process AI operations with Azure Service Bus
Description: Learn how to use Azure Service Bus to queue, distribute, and reliably process AI workloads using queues, topics, subscriptions, and dead-letter queues.

Title: Analyze text with Azure Language in Foundry Tools
Description: Use Azure Language in Foundry Tools to built text analysis solutions.

Title: Explore the Enterprise Desktop
Description: This module covers modern endpoint management and enterprise desktop lifecycle concepts.

Title: Introduction to vibe coding
Description: This module examines the vibe coding approach to app development and how to implement a vibe coding process to create and refine an app using GitHub Copilot Agent.

Title: Upload images to Azure Blob Storage from a static web app
Description: Learn how to securely upload images to Azure Blob Storage from a static web app by using an Azure Function to generate on demand shared access signatures.

Title: Protect and remediate sensitive data in Microsoft Purview
Description: Use Data Security Posture Management (DSPM) objectives and remediation workflows to select protection approaches, configure one-click policies, and assess and remediate oversharing risks across the data estate.

Title: Introduction to natural language processing with TensorFlow
Description: In this module, we explore different neural network architectures for processing natural language texts.

Title: Work with scripting constructs in Windows PowerShell
Description: This module explains how to use scripting constructs for iteration and decision making in Windows PowerShell.

Title: Deploy and manage Active Directory Domain Services domain controllers
Description: This module introduces you to the topology of domain controllers within an Active Directory environment. It also starts you down the path of deploying, managing, and migrating a domain controller between servers.

Title: Plan Resource Requirements
Description: Familiarize yourself with the various configuration options for a new Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL account.

Title: Get tips and tricks for teaching PL-300: Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst in academic programs
Description: Learn tips and tricks about preparing for your first teaching session, which labs to use, when and how to introduce technical topics, as well as other resources and materials.

Title: Introduction to Azure Application Gateway
Description: This module explains what Azure Application Gateway does, how it works, and when you should choose to use Application Gateway as a solution to meet your organization's needs.

Title: Build your first ASP.NET Core web app
Description: Learn how to build your first web app using ASP.NET Core.

Title: Build a Fabric data agent with an ontology
Description: Learn how to create a Fabric data agent that uses a Microsoft Fabric IQ ontology as its data source, configure agent instructions to improve accuracy, test natural language queries, and publish the agent for colleagues.

Title: Describe Azure storage services
Description: Azure storage services, tiers, redundancy options, and migration options and tools.

Title: Use Azure Databricks Genie in Microsoft Teams and Copilot Studio
Description: Learn how to access Azure Databricks Genie Spaces from Microsoft Teams using the Databricks app, and how to build a Copilot Studio agent grounded in a Genie Space. Covers governance, access paths, effective querying, permissions, and agent configuration.

Title: Pitch your product prototype
Description: Write a compelling and technically credible pitch deck for your Azure-based product prototype that resonates with your audience and accurately explains your solution.

Title: Introduction to budgeting for students
Description: Learn the fundamentals of budgeting to manage your money effectively, save for future goals, and reduce financial stress.

Title: Extend Bicep and ARM templates using deployment scripts
Description: Learn how to add custom steps to your Azure Resource Manager templates (ARM templates) and Bicep files by using deployment scripts.

Title: Expand query and transaction functionality in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
Description: Author user-defined functions and triggers using JavaScript in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL.

Title: Design AI agents for business solutions
Description: Learn to design AI agents tailored to business needs using Dynamics 365 and Copilot. Explore Responsible AI, custom connectors, and integration strategies.

Title: Store and manage containers in Azure Container Registry
Description: Learn to store, build, and manage container images using Azure Container Registry for AI applications on Azure.

Title: Perform evidence and entities investigations using Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
Description: Perform evidence and entities investigations using Microsoft Defender for Endpoint

Title: Classify and protect on-premises data with Microsoft Purview
Description: Classify and protect on-premises data with Microsoft Purview.

Title: Manage security for Arc-enabled hybrid servers
Description: Manage security controls for Azure Arc-enabled hybrid servers. Configure RBAC and extension security to prevent unauthorized agent modifications. Then apply Azure Policy to enforce security baselines on Arc-enrolled machines. Finally, monitor hybrid server security posture in Microsoft Defender for Cloud.

Title: Configure Azure Blob Storage
Description: Learn how to configure Azure Blob Storage, including tiers and object replication.

Title: Run containers on Windows Server
Description: Run containers on Windows Server

Title: Implement Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) with Azure Databricks
Description: Implement Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) with Azure Databricks

Title: Examine SAP HANA on Azure (Large Instances) sample architecture
Description: This module examines SAP HANA on Azure (Large Instances) sample architecture and workflow. Prepare for Exam AZ-120 Planning and Administering Microsoft Azure for SAP Workloads.

Title: Deliver with DevOps
Description: Build and run continuous integration and continuous delivery workflows using GitHub Actions.

Title: Create a knowledge mining solution with Azure AI Search
Description: Unlock the hidden insights in your data with Azure AI Search.

Title: Challenge project - Debug a C# console application using Visual Studio Code
Description: This module helps you evaluate your debugging skills. You start with a C# console application that contains code logic issues and a specification that describes the requirements. You’re challenged to demonstrate your ability to identify and fix the issues using the Visual Studio Code debugger tools.

Title: Secure developer AI environments with Microsoft Purview
Description: Microsoft Purview provides tools to secure developer AI environments by discovering apps, assessing data access, and applying appropriate protections. This includes detecting generative AI usage, assigning user risk levels, and applying dynamic enforcement based on user behavior and data sensitivity.

Title: Implement Azure Key Vault
Description: Implement Azure Key Vault

Title: Introduction to generative AI and agents
Description: Ever wondered how AI can create content, answer questions, and assist with tasks? This module introduces you to the world of generative AI and agents.

Title: Explore responsible AI
Description: Learn how to explore and implement responsible AI practices, including best practices, principles, and the global implications of human-AI interaction.
